Title: Update Repos
Description: A script to recure from the current directory and update all the git repositories
Code:
#!/bin/bash

# Directory to iterate through
# directory="/SeansStuff/Repos"
directory=$(pwd)

echo "$directory"

# Check if the directory exists
if [ ! -d "$directory" ]; then
  echo "Directory does not exist!"
  # exit 1
fi

echo "Iterating through the directories"

# Iterate through the directories
for repo in "$directory"/*; do
  if [ -d "$repo" ]; then
    # Check if it's a Git repository
    if [ -d "$repo/.git" ]; then
      echo "Updating repository: $repo"
      # Change to the repository directory
      cd "$repo"
      # Perform a git pull to update the repository
      git pull
      echo "Repository updated!"
    else
      echo "Skipping non-Git repository: $repo"
    fi
  fi
done

echo "Completed."
